__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus data source that scrapes rsync-proxy /metrics

panels.title: Active Connections
panels.description: Total currently relayed connections.

panels.title: Queued Connections
panels.description: Connections currently waiting for an active slot.

panels.title: Accept Rate
panels.description: Incoming connections per second (5m rate).

panels.title: Egress (out)
panels.description: Bytes sent to clients (5m rate).

panels.title: Ingress (in)
panels.description: Bytes received from clients (5m rate).

panels.title: Failures (last 1h)
panels.description: Sum of queue-full rejects, upstream dial errors, and unknown-module requests in the last hour.

panels.title: Connection Lifecycle Rate
panels.description: Per-second rate of connection events.

panels.title: Bandwidth
panels.description: Aggregate egress (sent to clients) and ingress (received from clients) throughput.

panels.title: Active Connections by Module (Top 15)
panels.description: Active connections grouped by module name.

panels.title: Active Connections by Backend (IP:port)
panels.description: Active connections grouped by upstream backend address. Note: the 'upstream' label here is the resolved IP:port, distinct from the upstream config name shown in the Queue panels.

panels.title: Queue Status by Upstream
panels.description: Per-upstream queue snapshot. queued_max=0 means no limit (NaN in the Util column). Capacity max values come from rsync-proxy config.

panels.title: Queued Connections by Upstream
panels.description: Per-upstream pending queue depth over time.

panels.title: Top Modules by Active Connections
panels.description: Which modules currently hold the most live connections.

panels.title: Live Connections (per-connection snapshot)
panels.description: One row per currently-active connection. Bytes are cumulative for the session and reset when the connection ends or rsync-proxy restarts.

panels.title: Module Completed Conn Rate (Top 10)
panels.description: Per-module rate of completed connections, summed across upstreams. Source: rsync_proxy_module_completed_connections_total.

panels.title: Module Egress Rate (Top 10)
panels.description: Per-module bytes sent rate (to clients). Source: rsync_proxy_module_sent_bytes_total.

panels.title: Module Ingress Rate (Top 10)
panels.description: Per-module bytes received rate (from clients). Source: rsync_proxy_module_received_bytes_total.

panels.title: Failure Rate by Type
panels.description: Per-second rate of each failure category, summed across upstreams.

panels.title: Failures by Upstream (last 1h)
panels.description: Total failures per upstream in the last hour. Helps locate which backends are misbehaving.

panels.title: Termination Rate by Cause
panels.description: Per-second rate of watcher-forced terminations: idle timeout, max duration exceeded, throughput floor breached.

panels.title: Watcher-Killed Connections (last 1h)
panels.description: Total connections forcibly closed by the relay watcher in the last hour.

panels.title: Restarts (last 24h)
panels.description: Number of process restarts detected in the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Network I/O (socket layer)
panels.description: Process-level socket bytes vs rsync-proxy-level bytes. Difference reflects rsync protocol overhead and other connections (e.g. /metrics scrapes).
